purpose: Decide which character folders may be loaded as full scene characters for one Academy 1198 scene_contract.
core_rule: Load full character cards only for POV, physically present, speaking, directly addressed, directly observed/heard, or currently scene-required characters. Scheduled/delayed/reference characters stay reference-only until their beat is reached.

selection_priority.condition: character is physically in current location or explicitly nearby and able to observe/hear
character spoke last turn, is expected to answer, or is currently addressed
last_user_turn or active NPC directly addresses this character
character can currently see/hear the interaction and their reaction matters to the scene
character is mentioned and the mention changes action, emotion, decision, risk, or knowledge in this scene
scene_goal is about this character, their duty, arrival, absence, procedure, conflict, or consequence
a selected relationship pair cannot be interpreted without this character's current memory
current day file explicitly activates this character now, not merely later today

reference_only_character_when: character is scheduled for a later beat in the current day
character is delayed and not yet physically present
character is part of first_introduction_registry but the player has not reached that location/beat
character is important globally but absent from the current scene
character is only in hidden past and past trigger is absent
character is only part of an unrelated relationship pair
do_not_select_character_when: only broader cast importance justifies loading
only future romance/hidden-bond author knowledge justifies loading
only an old schedule file or stale state mentions the character
only a bottom-block option mentions the character and the option was not chosen
the character would have to teleport or witness an earlier scene they missed

academy_start_rule_1198_08_15.rule: At the car-arrival beat, only Akira and Livia are full active characters. Ray is handled from current day file as temporary scene NPC; Haru/Raiden/Kir stay reference-only until entrance/court/late-arrival beats.

load_reason: pov | physically_present | speaking | directly_addressed | visible_observer | mentioned_with_relevance | scene_goal_requires | relationship_pair_requires | calendar_requires_now
source_files: characters/<id>/past.yaml only if allowed by past_trigger_rules_1198

diagnostic_required_if: no full character can be selected
a scheduled/delayed character would be promoted to full without location/time/trigger
a required character folder is missing main.yaml or character.yaml
